title: AutoClutch
description: Clutching so that you don't die thanks to the Ender Dragon
body:
# AutoClutch

A lightweight client-side Fabric mod that helps you land water bucket clutches more consistently with natural, human-like timing.

## Overview

AutoClutch is a quality-of-life mod designed to assist with water bucket clutching. It helps reduce missed placements by triggering your bucket at the right moment during a fall, improving consistency without changing core gameplay mechanics.

## Features

✨ **Clutch Assistance** - Helps time water bucket placement during falls for more consistent landings

⚙️ **Configurable Behavior** - Adjust trigger distance and timing variance to suit your playstyle in the config menu

🎮 **Client-Side Only** - Does not need to be installed on the server to work


## How It Works

AutoClutch monitors your fall state and assists with water bucket placement when a fall that could cause damage is detected. The timing is configurable and includes slight variation to keep behavior natural and consistent with normal gameplay.


## Disclaimer ⚠️

This mod is intended as a quality-of-life assist tool. Server rules regarding gameplay automation may vary, so be sure to check whether its use is allowed before enabling the mod on multiplayer servers.

The author is not responsible for any server-side restrictions, penalties, or account actions resulting from the use of this mod.

## Support & Issues

For bug reports, feature requests, or questions, please visit the GitHub repository and open an issue.
